title: Peripherals Not Working
drDigitalIntro:
Peripherals are devices you plug in — keyboard, mouse, printer, headphones.
• If one stops working, check the cable or wireless connection.
• Unplug and replug it, or change the battery.
• Restart your computer so it can "see" the device again.

playgroundTask.scenario: A peripheral device is not connecting

steps.say: Read the error message about the peripheral.
Check whether the cable is connected properly.
Try restarting the computer to force it to detect devices.

drDigitalSuccess: You troubleshot a peripheral! Check cable → restart — most peripheral issues are that simple.
drDigitalHint: Read the error, check cable connections, then restart your computer.
